title: fix: kube play liveness probe http path
body:
Follow-up on the [15958](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/15958).

- When a pod with HTTP liveness probe is created using podman kube play, ensure the [Kubernetes defaults value for path](https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-liveness-readiness-startup-probes/#http-probes) is set correctly.
- Update the URI scheme to use lowercase and use this value in code (not used otherwise, URI are lowercase)

Fixes #15855 for the final parameter. I am sorry that I missed this in the original pull request.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
